variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS line from the candidate list. Did not also select 'Costs of goods and services sold' to avoid duplicate mapping of the same concept.

Balance sheet asset category, not SG&A expense.

candidates.why: Best available recurring finance-cost bucket; captures interest and related recurring financing costs. Prefer this total over pairing with balancing rows.

candidates.why: Specific recurring interest component, but only one part of total finance cost.

Balancing row, should not be used when the parent financial expenses row exists.

variables.notes: Selected the main recurring finance-cost line. Did not combine with lease-interest component to avoid double counting, and excluded balancing/supplemental rows.

candidates.row_label: Portion of profit after tax from associated companies recognized in accordance with the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement equity-method earnings, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no parent/owner equity line exists; here it duplicates the parent equity line.
Shareholder count, not equity amount.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses parent-shareholder equity first because it best excludes NCI. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback because labels may vary by year; values are identical in the preview, suggesting no NCI is present.

No non-controlling interest/minority interest row is present on the balance sheet preview. Since BE uses the parent equity line and Total Equity is identical, MIB is mapped to empty as genuinely absent.
